summary: Set 048 Session 1 closes the audit pass for the Lightweight-Tier Parity work. The two-pass devil's-advocate cross-provider consensus protocol ran against a self-authored 414-line audit proposal that absorbed four operator-locked premises P1-P4 (Lightweight = same exact process as Full + UX-identical + no router + no auto-verify + suggested UAT/E2E + no hand-edit, inherited from Set 047 audit), five operator-locked decisions D1-D5 (single dabbler-ai-router package + dual-surface commands + three command names + tri-state suggested + CLI backcompat, inherited from Set 047 audit), and four new operator-locked additions L1-L4 (path-reference prompts + hierarchical context menu + remove Open AI Assignment + close-on-blur, added at Set 048 stub-revision time). Pass A (gemini-2.5-pro route + gpt-5-4-mini verify) = ENDORSE WITH REVISIONS + verifier ISSUES_FOUND with Critical L1 violation flagged. Pass B devil's-advocate (gemini-2.5-pro route + gpt-5-4-mini verify) = ENDORSE WITH SPECIFIC BIAS FLIPS + verifier ISSUES_FOUND with same Critical L1 violation flagged. Cumulative S1 routed cost $0.1027 of $10 NTE (1.0%). Final dispositions: FLIPPED Bias 3 (cursor-anchor preservation -> showQuickPick; L4 close-on-blur becomes free byproduct), FLIPPED Bias 5 PARTIAL (warning-only -> soft gate with interactive [y/N] in TTY mode + non-interactive bypass + --accept-suggestions flag), STAND BY Bias 1 (three-knob activation CLI>env>spec>default), STAND BY Bias 2 (path-reference ONLY — both passes' content-embed fallback recommendations ruled L1 violations by verifier; resolved via UX docs not prompt-format compromise), STAND BY Bias 6 (repo-level review-criteria storage), OPERATOR OVERRIDE on Bias 4 (triple-redundancy reminders -> single upfront positive-confirmation prompt from AI orchestrator), OPERATOR DISPOSITION on Bias 7 split (combine S3 + S4 into one session — 5-session arc instead of 6), OPERATOR DISPOSITION on Bias 8 split (ship Set 047 HELD publishes BEFORE Set 048 S2 begins). Stub spec.md rewritten to AUDIT-LOCKED with Session Set Configuration (totalSessions=5, prerequisites=[047], requiresUAT=true, requiresE2E=false, uatStyle=ad-hoc, effort=high, tier=full), §1-§7 covering what ships, premises, locked decisions, 5-session breakdown (S2 --no-router mode + tri-state runtime + soft gate, S3 combined copyable-prompt + context-menu IA, S4 docs + migrator + bootstrap tier-branch, S5 UAT + change-log + version bumps + publish), non-goals (including content-embed fallback EXPLICITLY excluded per L1), deferred follow-ups Q5 + telemetry, cross-references. No code change in this session; cross-provider consensus IS the session verification for an audit session.

reason.specifics: Set 048 Session 2 is blocked on a pre-S2 operator action: Set 047's HELD PyPI dabbler-ai-router 0.9.0 + Marketplace dabbler-ai-orchestration 0.22.0 publishes must ship before S2 begins (per audit verdict §4.2 + operator confirmation 2026-05-26). The publishes are operator-initiated since they require the Marketplace PAT (env var AZURE_VSCODE_MARKETPLACE_TOKEN) and PyPI twine credentials. Once published, S2 starts the --no-router mode + tri-state schema/runtime + soft-gate close-out work.
